$schema: Agent template migration registry. Used by sync-l0 to detect breaking changes and guide consumers through upgrades.

1.0.0.note: Initial PM template — flat dispatch model, architect gates

1.1.0.note: Added pre-flight checklist, context management, token budgets

2.0.0.note: 3-phase model replaces flat dispatch. DISPOSABLE dev rule. Execution trigger.
2.0.0.migration_hint: PM now orchestrates 3 sequential teams (Planning → Execution → Quality Gate). Devs must be spawned as anonymous Agent(prompt=...) without name/team_name. Run /sync-l0 to get the updated template.

5.1.0.note: Added persistent architect lifecycle, PRE-TASK context-provider consult protocol, supersede guardrails

1.0.0.note: Initial planner as sub-agent spawned by PM

1.1.0.note: Planner is now a Planning Team PEER (not sub-agent). Uses SendMessage.
1.1.0.migration_hint: Planner must have SendMessage in tools and describe itself as 'team peer', not 'sub-agent spawned by PM'.

1.0.0.note: Initial quality-gater — 5-step sequential protocol, PASS/FAIL report

1.1.0.note: Added retry limit (max 3) to prevent infinite QG→Phase2 loops

1.0.0.note: Initial doc-migrator — 3 modes (Full Migration, Gap Fill, Realignment)

1.6.0.note: Added DURING-WAVE re-consult protocol (MUST-language), Scope Validation Gate against PLAN.md, Exact Fix Format for dispatches

1.7.0.note: Added Post-Approve Auto-Dispatch + Flag Specificity + No Re-Verification Loops
